text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On my day off, I stopped by a bookstore while out shopping and—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Mmmmmmm… It's not here either. 
Isn't that book in the new releases section…?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Hmm. As for bigger stores than this one… There's one nearby, and two farther away, huh. But today is about the only day I have to use up a whole day like this—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Whoa!? 
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Umm… 『No More Messes! The Ultimate Organizing Method』 and 『No Mistakes! A Thorough Guide to Accounting!』

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: And 『Unknown Acupoints～ Mystical Acupressure』 along with 『Ultimate Stamina Recipes: Delicacies Edition』… I'm looking for these four books!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Practicality comes first, after all. 
And these are exactly what I need right now!
choice_data_list: <size=38>I can help you look if you want</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Really!? With you here, it'll be like having the strength of a hundred people! Let's go look for them right away!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Haah… Haah… I'm sooo exhausted…! 
I never expected we'd end up hitting up every large bookstore in town…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
But! Thanks to you, we got all four of them～! 
You were really a huge help!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer, don't hold back and drink up! 
This is my way of saying thanks for today!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Gulp… Ahh～ 
That hits the spot～～!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
The sourness of the lime soaking into my tired body… 
Phew～… This is the taste of victory!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe～… 
Once I master the contents of these four books—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: (You'll be able to rely on me!)

text_block_list.name: Imaginary Trainer
text_block_list.text: 『Haah… The work and paperwork just keep piling up. I have to find the receipts before I can even submit expenses… Ahh, I'm in trouble, what do I do～!』
Hehehe… You look like you're in trouble! But there's no need to worry. Just leave it to—

text_block_list.name: Master Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Master Tsuyoshi!

text_block_list.name: Master Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Secret Organizing Technique… 
Thousand-Strike Document Sorting!

text_block_list.name: Imaginary Trainer
text_block_list.text: 『T-The chaos of documents and receipts where I couldn't tell what was where, sorted in an instant…!』

text_block_list.name: Imaginary Trainer
text_block_list.text: 『…Guh!? I sat down for a quick break, and my eyes, shoulders, and lower back suddenly reached their limit～!』

text_block_list.name: Master Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: It's alright! I've studied acupoints and mastered the secret technique of stimulating vitality!

text_block_list.name: Master Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Here I go! Life-and-Death Acupoint Stimulation Method: Final Acupressure! Wataaaah!

text_block_list.name: Imaginary Trainer
text_block_list.text: 『A-Amazing…! The blurriness in my eyes has cleared up, and the pain in my shoulders and lower back is gone too～～!!』

text_block_list.name: Imaginary Trainer
text_block_list.text: 『Ugh～ Using being busy as an excuse, I've been eating irregularly, and now I'm in a state of chronic fatigue～!』

text_block_list.name: Master Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. In the past, to strengthen my own body, I sought out the ultimate stamina food and devoted myself to my studies…

text_block_list.name: Master Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: My weak constitution is a thing of the past. I am now the picture of health. That is to say, the 『One Who Has Mastered Health』! Allow me to treat you to my magnum opus, the 『Explosive Meat Diamond Set Meal』!

text_block_list.name: Imaginary Trainer
text_block_list.text:
『Whooaa～! 
Power is surging through my whole body, and I feel like I'm getting kind of macho～!』

text_block_list.name: Master Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Furthermore, your respiratory system will be strengthened and you'll never choke again! Medicine and food have the same origin, so leave all your health management to me!

text_block_list.name: Imaginary Trainer
text_block_list.text: 『You're amazing, Tsuyoshi! So reliable, Tsuyoshi! Master Tsuyoshi～!』

text_block_list.name: Master Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Having mastered both work and health support, I have no weaknesses! My position as your 『Most Reliable Horsegirl of the Year』 is rock solid!

text_block_list.name: Master Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Fufufu… Ahaha… Ahahaha!!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ehe… Ehehe… Ehehehehe…♪

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Hweah!?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She seemed completely out of it, so I waved my hand in front of her eyes and called out to her a few times.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine, I'm listening! I can hear you!
choice_data_list: <size=38>Good. Well, I'm about to get going soon</size>
<size=38>Good. Well, I'm about to get going soon</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ah, thank you so much!
choice_data_list: <size=36>I'll lend a hand if you run into any more trouble</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Yes, understood～! 
Thanks for your hard work today～!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Hm? 
Lend… a hand?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Umm— I went out to town this morning to look for books, searched everywhere but couldn't find them…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Then I bumped into Trainer, 
and had them help me—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I was totally relying on them! Me! 
I was the one having a hand lent to me!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I mean, I basically relied on them all day long!?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Guh～! The road to becoming the reliable Master Tsuyoshi is a long one…!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: But I won't give up～! Over the summer, I'll become a Master—or at least 『Slightly Masterful Tsuyoshi』!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Savoring the sourness spreading in her mouth, Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi resolved to try even harder.
